data.title: Add hyperfine perf benchmark for write ops targeting <0.05s
data.description:
## Task
In tests/scripts/test-ticket-perf.sh (or extend it), add tests for write-path ops (ticket create, ticket comment) using hyperfine with --warmup 3 --runs 10, asserting mean < 0.05s. Follow same skip-if-no-hyperfine pattern. Testing mode: GREEN.

## Story
29e5-0a74 — remediation from completion-verifier FAIL
